languages.text: {n}В линзе аугментического глаза Себериана вспыхивает гневная алая искра.{/n} "Не спрашивайте меня о ней. Пусть Ювенна и является моей дочерью, но все, что некогда нас связывало, кануло в пучину веков и обратилось в прах. Это все, что вам следует знать".

traits.locale_text: {n}В линзе аугментического глаза Себериана вспыхивает гневная алая искра.{/n} "Не спрашивайте меня о ней. Пусть Ювенна и является моей дочерью, но все, что некогда нас связывало, кануло в пучину веков и обратилось в прах. Это все, что вам следует знать".
traits.speaker: DLC3_DL_SeberianVonValancius

languages.text: {n}A crimson spark of anger flashes in Seberian's augmented eye.{/n} "Do not ask me of her. Juvenna was my daughter, yet everything that once tied us together has vanished into the abyss of ages. All has turned to dust. That is all you need to know."
languages.original_text: {n}В линзе аугментического глаза Себериана вспыхивает гневная алая искра.{/n} "Не спрашивайте меня о ней. Пусть Ювенна и является моей дочерью, но все, что некогда нас связывало, кануло в пучину веков и обратилось в прах. Это все, что вам следует знать".

traits.locale_text: {n}A crimson spark of anger flashes in Seberian's augmented eye.{/n} "Do not ask me of her. Juvenna was my daughter, yet everything that once tied us together has vanished into the abyss of ages. All has turned to dust. That is all you need to know."
{n}The inflamed skin stretches at the edge of his cranial implant as Seberian narrows his eyes in contempt.{/n} "I would prefer not to speak of her, but if you insist..."

{n}A crimson spark of anger flashes in Seberian's augmented eye.{/n} "Do not ask me of her. Juvenna was my daughter, yet everything that once tied us together has vanished into the abyss of ages. All has turned to dust. That is all you need to know."

{n}A crimson spark of anger flashes in Seberian's augmented eye.{/n} "Do not ask me of her. Juvenna was my daughter, yet everything that once tied us together has vanished into the abyss of ages. All has turned to dust. That is all you need to know."

{n}A crimson spark of anger flashes in Seberian's augmented eye.{/n} "Do not ask me of her. Juvenna was my daughter, yet everything that once tied us together has vanished into the abyss of ages. All has turned to dust. That is all you need to know."

{n}A crimson spark of anger flashes in Seberian's augmented eye.{/n} "Do not ask me of her. Juvenna was my daughter, yet everything that once tied us together has vanished into the abyss of ages. All has turned to dust. That is all you need to know."

languages.text: {n}Ein roter Funke Zorn blitzt in Seberians augmentiertem Auge auf.{/n} "Fragt mich nicht nach ihr. Juvenna war meine Tochter, aber alles, was uns einst verband, ist im Abyss der Zeitalter verschwunden. Alles ist zu Staub zerfallen. Mehr müsst Ihr nicht wissen."
languages.original_text: {n}A crimson spark of anger flashes in Seberian's augmented eye.{/n} "Do not ask me of her. Juvenna was my daughter, yet everything that once tied us together has vanished into the abyss of ages. All has turned to dust. That is all you need to know."

traits.locale_text: {n}Ein roter Funke Zorn blitzt in Seberians augmentiertem Auge auf.{/n} "Fragt mich nicht nach ihr. Juvenna war meine Tochter, aber alles, was uns einst verband, ist im Abyss der Zeitalter verschwunden. Alles ist zu Staub zerfallen. Mehr müsst Ihr nicht wissen."

languages.text: {n}Une étincelle de colère illumine l'œil augmenté de Seberian.{/n} « Ne me parlez pas d'elle. Juvenna était ma fille, mais tout ce qui nous liait par le passé a fini par disparaître dans les abîmes du temps. Il n'en reste que poussière. Vous n'avez pas besoin d'en savoir davantage. »
languages.original_text: {n}A crimson spark of anger flashes in Seberian's augmented eye.{/n} "Do not ask me of her. Juvenna was my daughter, yet everything that once tied us together has vanished into the abyss of ages. All has turned to dust. That is all you need to know."

traits.locale_text: {n}Une étincelle de colère illumine l'œil augmenté de Seberian.{/n} « Ne me parlez pas d'elle. Juvenna était ma fille, mais tout ce qui nous liait par le passé a fini par disparaître dans les abîmes du temps. Il n'en reste que poussière. Vous n'avez pas besoin d'en savoir davantage. »

languages.text: {n}Una chispa carmesí de furia destella en el ojo aumentado de Seberian.{/n} «No me pregunte sobre ella. Juvenna era mi hija, pero todo lo que nos unía se ha desvanecido en el abismo del tiempo. Todo se ha convertido en polvo. No necesita saber nada más».
languages.original_text: {n}A crimson spark of anger flashes in Seberian's augmented eye.{/n} "Do not ask me of her. Juvenna was my daughter, yet everything that once tied us together has vanished into the abyss of ages. All has turned to dust. That is all you need to know."

traits.locale_text: {n}Una chispa carmesí de furia destella en el ojo aumentado de Seberian.{/n} «No me pregunte sobre ella. Juvenna era mi hija, pero todo lo que nos unía se ha desvanecido en el abismo del tiempo. Todo se ha convertido en polvo. No necesita saber nada más».

languages.text: {n}Seberian'ın ogmentli gözünde kızıl bir öfke kıvılcımı çakıyor.{/n} "Bana onu sorma. Juvenna benim kızımdı ancak bir zamanlar bizi birbirimize bağlayan her şey, dipsiz çağlar içinde kayboldu. Her şey toza dönüştü. Bilmen gereken tek şey bu."
languages.original_text: {n}A crimson spark of anger flashes in Seberian's augmented eye.{/n} "Do not ask me of her. Juvenna was my daughter, yet everything that once tied us together has vanished into the abyss of ages. All has turned to dust. That is all you need to know."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian'ın ogmentli gözünde kızıl bir öfke kıvılcımı çakıyor.{/n} "Bana onu sorma. Juvenna benim kızımdı ancak bir zamanlar bizi birbirimize bağlayan her şey, dipsiz çağlar içinde kayboldu. Her şey toza dönüştü. Bilmen gereken tek şey bu."

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安那只植入眼闪过了一抹猩红怒火。{/n}“别跟我提她。尤文娜是我的女儿，但曾经把我们联系起来的一切，早已坠入岁月的深渊。一切都化作尘埃了。你知道这些就够了。”
languages.original_text: {n}A crimson spark of anger flashes in Seberian's augmented eye.{/n} "Do not ask me of her. Juvenna was my daughter, yet everything that once tied us together has vanished into the abyss of ages. All has turned to dust. That is all you need to know."

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安那只植入眼闪过了一抹猩红怒火。{/n}“别跟我提她。尤文娜是我的女儿，但曾经把我们联系起来的一切，早已坠入岁月的深渊。一切都化作尘埃了。你知道这些就够了。”

languages.text: {n}セベリアンの強化された目は、怒りの赤く燃える光を放つ。{/n}「彼女について尋ねないで。ユベナは私の娘だったが、私たちを繋いでいたものは全て、時の流れの深淵に消え去った。全ては塵と化した。それが全てだ。」
languages.original_text: {n}A crimson spark of anger flashes in Seberian's augmented eye.{/n} "Do not ask me of her. Juvenna was my daughter, yet everything that once tied us together has vanished into the abyss of ages. All has turned to dust. That is all you need to know."

traits.locale_text: {n}セベリアンの強化された目は、怒りの赤く燃える光を放つ。{/n}「彼女について尋ねないで。ユベナは私の娘だったが、私たちを繋いでいたものは全て、時の流れの深淵に消え去った。全ては塵と化した。それが全てだ。」
